generated_oml:
instance FrictionModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction model parameters derived from data deviation for control algorithm updates"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of integrated sensor and simulation data"
]

instance MotionAccuracyAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Update control algorithms for improved motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of static, kinetic, and viscous friction using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization dashboard for integrated data"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyEnhancementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy enhancement through model-based control updates"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyAction
]

instance SysML : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling of the robot axis components"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, VisualizationService
]

instance Simulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for simulation of motor and gearbox dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]

instance AAS : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for data linking"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, VisualizationService, MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]

instance MQTT : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT communication protocol for sensor data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, VisualizationService, MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840Dsl : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for motion control"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard tools for real-time data visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance BlockDefinitionDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for MABI MAX 100 first axis components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysML
]

instance InternalBlockDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysML
]

instance SimulinkMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink
]

instance SimulinkGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for cycloidal gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for data linking between physical and virtual components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AAS
]

instance MeasuredTorque : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured torque data from physical robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AAS, MQTT, Simulink
]

instance MeasuredAngularVelocity : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured angular velocity from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AAS, MQTT, Simulink
]

instance MeasuredCurrent : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current I_M from physical robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AAS, MQTT, Simulink
]

instance SimulatedTorque : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque data from gearbox model"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink, AAS
]

instance SimulatedAngularVelocity : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated angular velocity from motor model"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink, AAS
]

instance SimulatedCurrent : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated current data from motor model"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink, AAS
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, CurrentSensor
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance CurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MotorEncoderData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder measuring position angles of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderData
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder behind the gearbox measuring position angles"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderData
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current I_M"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentData
]

instance RobotAxis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "First axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot with permanent magnet synchronous motor, gearwheel, and cycloidal gearbox"
]

instance RobotEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains RobotAxis
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with continuous data streaming for immediate processing of live measurements."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A digital shadow integrating structural and behavioral models with live data streams, processed through computational components to generate traceable data traces visualized in a unified dashboard."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase, focusing on real-time data during robot usage to account for wear, tool changes, and varying applications."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through deviation analysis between simulated and measured data; multi-physics model integration to capture friction dynamics under varying loads and temperatures."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data transmission from physical robot to digital shadow."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) enabling standardized data exchange with external Industrie 4.0 systems."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "SysML for system modeling and Asset Administration Shells (AAS) compliant with Industrie 4.0 standards."
]
